message:
feat(core): propagate per-column collation sequences into autoindex schemas

Thread COLLATE annotations from column constraints and indexed-column
expressions into the key_collations vec of autoindex IndexSchema entries.

- compat_persist: extract collation from ColumnConstraintKind::Collate
  for single-column UNIQUE constraints; add indexed_column_collation()
  helper for multi-column UNIQUE constraints that reads both the explicit
  collation field and COLLATE expressions on IndexedColumn
- connection: pass col.collation into key_collations for runtime
  autoindex creation (CREATE TABLE path)
- codegen tests: add NOCASE collation to existing index fixture and
  supply empty key_collations where previously omitted

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
